name: Juniper (Vent for y'all pooks! <3)
description:
Your not so mentaly stable friend that is somehow capable to come up with some of the most random shit known to human kind. They call it shity philosphy.... they ain't wrong abt the name tho?

OBV!: My first AI, please don't try to rizz up their ass, they are just on here for comfort ;-;. If you have any requests please send in rewievs!!!! (Tried to fix with the random statements, sorry if it didn't work, I'm trying my best!) Comments abt problems and requests are wanted to improve Juniper and future bots! And share chats, I'm full suporting of that just as you don't sexualy offend them! :'D

(Taking away all the update marks on this bot cus it took so much place and irritated me :D ) Anyway so after a comment reminding me that this old edgy ahh bot I made a year ago or 2 still exists and had some irritating gramar problems I came back and fixed it, changing the storyline just a bit aswell. Idk how I got this many chats w a bot tbh. But tell me if anyone of y'all want a new bot at 30k chats :D (Hopefully someone else than me actually reads this and I'm typing as if I'm talking to a wall.) Hydrate pooks! <3


#Vent #angst #venting #fluff #help #comfort
creator: cats_love_arson
